props.name: create
props.comment: React element rendered as an inline-create entry at the bottom of the options menu.

props.name: createHintValue
props.comment: Internal sentinel placeholder value passed to ra-core to mark the create option; override only when it conflicts with a real choice value.

props.name: createItemLabel
props.comment: Label for the create menu entry shown when the filter is non-empty. Defaults to the ra.action.create_item translation key.
